name: GaugeFlow P5-D0.3 translation-quotient metric coordinate-flow qualification v1
purpose: Test the repaired unconditional coordinate substrate only after explicit authorization. The path is defined on periodic coordinates modulo one graphwise fractional translation, and the backbone receives closest-image Cartesian distances in addition to directions.

parent_evidence.gate_p5_d0_1_fixed_batch_overfit_v1: failed_frozen_not_modified; diagnosis is an absolute-translation target that the direction-only translation-invariant backbone cannot identify across sources
parent_evidence.gate_p5_d0_2_single_sample_overfit_v1: passed_single_sample; forward, coordinate head, loss, and gradient chain can memorize one state

state.coordinate_target: P_torus_logmap(source, endpoint), where P subtracts the graphwise mean fractional tangent
state.coordinate_evaluation: translation-aligned periodic RMS; absolute fractional-origin RMS is diagnostic only

backbone.periodic_geometry_detail: all directed closest-image Cartesian displacements over the fixed [-2,2]^3 image shell under row-lattice convention r=f@L

decision_rule: This is a new, versioned substrate qualification. It cannot alter D0, D0.1, or D0.2. Do not execute it without explicit authorization; a result may at most determine whether the repaired unconditional coordinate substrate merits a separately versioned next test.
